prayer:

Anoint the cycling conduits with sacred oils whilst intoning the Litany of Renewal.
Monitor the Shadowsword's vitals through auspex rites, invoking harmonious revolution.
Sanctify the completed cycling with a hymn to the Motive Force, ensuring predatory readiness.

Kneel before the vox transmitter, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its fractured etheric coils.
Commence repair rituals by excising corrupted waveguides, appeasing the irate Machine Spirit with canticles of restoration.
Solder micro-rites with sanctified flux, beseeching coherence in its vocal emissions.
Test the vox transmitter's mend through binaric catechisms, anointing relays with blessed unguents.
Proclaim the Machine Spirit's pacification, ready for the Emperor's decree.
